parameters.jsCode:
const lead = $json; const tier = lead.tier; const coord = lead.coordinator || {}; const evt = lead.event || {}; const log = lead.logistics || {}; const eventTypeMap = { 'corporate': 'Corporate / Office', 'wedding': 'Wedding', 'birthday': 'Birthday Party', 'graduation': 'Graduation', 'church': 'Church / Religious', 'school': 'School / University', 'nonprofit': 'Nonprofit / Community', 'other': 'Other' }; const budgetMap = { 'lt300': 'Under $300', '300-600': '$300 – $600', '600-1200': '$600 – $1,200', '1200-2500': '$1,200 – $2,500', 'gt2500': '$2,500+', 'quote': 'Need a quote' }; const serviceMap = { 'drop-off': 'Drop-off (self-serve)', 'staffed-buffet': 'Staffed buffet', 'plated': 'Plated / table service', 'undecided': 'Not sure — need guidance' }; const headcountMap = { '10-20': '10–20', '21-40': '21–40', '41-60': '41–60', '61-100': '61–100', '101-150': '101–150', '151-250': '151–250', '250+': '250+' }; const formatDate = function(dateStr) { if (!dateStr) return ''; const d = new Date(dateStr + 'T12:00:00'); return d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' }); }; const formatTime = function(timeStr) { if (!timeStr) return ''; const parts = timeStr.split(':'); const h = parseInt(parts[0]); const m = parts[1]; const ampm = h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'; const displayH = h % 12 || 12; return displayH + ':' + m + ' ' + ampm; }; const vars = { coord_name: coord.name || '', coord_email: coord.email || '', coord_phone: coord.phone || '', event_name: evt.name || '', event_type: eventTypeMap[evt.type] || evt.type || '', event_date: formatDate(evt.date), event_time: formatTime(evt.time), event_duration: evt.duration_hours + ' hours', setup_time: evt.setup_minutes_before + ' minutes', headcount: headcountMap[log.headcount_range] || String(log.headcount || ''), venue_name: log.venue_name || '', venue_address: log.venue_address || '', budget: budgetMap[lead.budget.range] || lead.budget.range || '', who_pays: lead.budget.who_pays || '', payment_timing: lead.budget.payment_timing || '', service_style: serviceMap[log.service_style] || log.service_style || '', dietary: Array.isArray(lead.food.dietary_restrictions) ? lead.food.dietary_restrictions.join(', ') : '', menu_prefs: lead.food.menu_preferences || '', equipment: Array.isArray(log.equipment_needed) ? log.equipment_needed.join(', ') : '', special_requests: lead.food.special_requests || '', score: lead.score, lead_id: lead.lead_id }; const subjects = { REJECT: 'Re: Your Utopia Deli Catering Request — We Need to Decline', REVIEW: 'Re: Your Utopia Deli Catering Request — We Need a Few Details', ACCEPT: 'Available for ' + vars.event_name + '! — Utopia Deli Catering' }; const bodies = { REJECT: `

Thank you for considering Utopia Deli

Hi ${vars.coord_name},

Thank you for considering Utopia Deli for ${vars.event_name} on ${vars.event_date}.

After reviewing your event details, we unfortunately are not able to accommodate this request. This is usually due to one of the following:

  • Short notice (we need at least 48 hours for catering)
  • Distance beyond our delivery range
  • Headcount below our catering minimum (10 people)
  • Date conflicts with existing bookings

We would love to serve you in the future! For events with more lead time or larger groups, please reach out again.

Questions? Call or text us at (501) 551-5944.

— The Utopia Deli Team
801 S. Chester, Little Rock, AR

`, REVIEW: `

We are interested — need a few details

Hi ${vars.coord_name},

Thanks for your catering request for ${vars.event_name} on ${vars.event_date}! We are potentially interested but need a bit more information before we can confirm.

Could you please reply with:

  1. A more specific headcount (even an estimate)
  2. Your preferred budget per person, or total budget
  3. Whether the venue has kitchen facilities or power outlets
  4. Any flexibility on the event date or time

Once we have these details, we can give you a firm yes/no within 24 hours.

— The Utopia Deli Team
(501) 551-5944

Lead ID: ${vars.lead_id}

`, ACCEPT: `

Great news — we are available!

Hi ${vars.coord_name},

Great news — Utopia Deli is available for ${vars.event_name} on ${vars.event_date}!

Here is what happens next:

  1. Menu email — We will send you a catering menu with pricing within 24 hours
  2. You select items and confirm final headcount
  3. We send an invoice — 50% deposit required to book your date
  4. Balance due 2 weeks before the event
  5. Events within 2 weeks: Full payment required upfront to book

Your event details:

  • Date: ${vars.event_date} at ${vars.event_time}
  • Headcount: ${vars.headcount} people
  • Venue: ${vars.venue_name}
  • Setup: ${vars.setup_time} before event
  • Service: ${vars.service_style}

Questions? Call or text (501) 551-5944.

— The Utopia Deli Team
Lead ID: ${vars.lead_id}
801 S. Chester, Little Rock, AR

` }; const ownerSubject = 'HIGH-QUALITY CATERING LEAD: ' + vars.event_name + ' (Score: ' + vars.score + ')'; const ownerBody = `

NEW CATERING LEAD — Score: ${vars.score}/100

Event: ${vars.event_name}

Type: ${vars.event_type}

Date: ${vars.event_date} at ${vars.event_time}

Headcount: ${vars.headcount}

Budget: ${vars.budget}

Venue: ${vars.venue_name} (${log.venue_distance})

Coordinator: ${vars.coord_name}

Phone: ${vars.coord_phone}

Email: ${vars.coord_email}

Payment: ${vars.who_pays} — ${vars.payment_timing}

Service: ${vars.service_style}

Dietary: ${vars.dietary || 'None'}

Equipment: ${vars.equipment || 'None'}

Special requests: ${vars.special_requests || 'None'}

Lead ID: ${vars.lead_id}

Full details: Google Sheets (Utopia Deli Catering Leads)

`; return [{ json: { lead_id: lead.lead_id, tier: tier, score: lead.score, customer_email: vars.coord_email, customer_subject: subjects[tier], customer_body: bodies[tier], owner_subject: ownerSubject, owner_body: ownerBody, event: lead.event, logistics: lead.logistics, budget: lead.budget, coordinator: lead.coordinator, food: lead.food, meta: lead.meta, breakdown: lead.breakdown } }];
